description:
Discover how I set up an almost base model M4 Mac Mini as a powerful home server for Plex, iCloud management, video streaming, and more! From configuring Hazel to leveraging Transloader and Homebridge, learn why this compact Mac is perfect as a behind-the-scenes powerhouse.

Also, "Punctilious" means "diligent."

🖥️ Get an M4 Mac mini

https://geni.us/VPPuY8

⭐️ Accessories Mentioned

4K HDMI Dongle
https://geni.us/512eMVi

Elgato Capture Card
https://geni.us/virC58

💻 Apps Mentioned

Hazel
https://www.noodlesoft.com

Screens VNC
https://edovia.com/en/screens/

Transloader
https://eternalstorms.at/transloader/

🤫 Sneaky Link
https://beard.fm/secret

🏠 Network Build of New House
https://youtu.be/wPHBkIWU6Cg?si=3EGCmVeTXBhf6VRI

🎙️ Watch my tech podcast, Primary Technology:
https://www.youtube.com/@PrimaryTechShow

⭐️ Join the Shortcuts and tech community! Access my Shortcuts database, priority Shortcuts requests, LIVE streams, and more benefits:
https://create.beard.fm

🏠 Full List of My Smart Home Devices
https://beard.fm/homekit

⭐️ Try Riverside today, it's what I use to record all my podcasts!
https://beard.fm/riverside

💻 Final Cut Plugins and Effects from MotionVFX
https://mvfx.co/StephenRobles

📲 Follow me on:

Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/stephenrobles.com
Threads: https://threads.net/@stephenrobles
Instagram: https://instagram.com/stephenrobles

Chapters ➡

00:00 Introduction
00:24 Mac mini Size Comparison
01:37 Setting Up M4 Mac mini
02:23 Accessing a Headless Mac mini
03:17 Auto Login Items
05:02 Remote VNC Access
05:53 Main Use Case
06:50 Photo Library Management
07:31 iCloud Family Accounts
07:56 Video Game Streaming
10:06 Mac mini for Homebridge
